description: Phase 1.1: Create make/action.rs — Central Action enum with 9 variants for idempotent scaffolding actions
steps: Create new file crates/libaipm/src/make/action.rs

Define Action enum with variants: DirectoryCreated, DirectoryAlreadyExists, FileWritten, FileAlreadyExists, PluginRegistered, PluginAlreadyRegistered, PluginEnabled, PluginAlreadyEnabled, PluginCreated
Each variant carries PathBuf/String fields as specified in spec section 5.5
Derive Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq on the enum
Use std::path::PathBuf for path fields, String for name/description/engine fields, Vec<String> for features field on PluginCreated
Run cargo build --workspace to verify compilation
Run cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings to verify lint compliance
Run cargo fmt --check to verify formatting

description: Phase 1.2: Create make/error.rs — Error enum for make operations with thiserror derives
steps: Create new file crates/libaipm/src/make/error.rs

Define Error enum with variants: MarketplaceNotFound, InvalidName(String), UnsupportedFeature { feature, engine }, InvalidEngine(String), InvalidFeature(String), MissingFlag(String), Io(#[from] std::io::Error), Json(#[from] serde_json::Error)
Use #[derive(Debug, thiserror::Error)] and #[error(...)] attributes matching spec section 5.8
Verify thiserror is already a dependency in crates/libaipm/Cargo.toml; add if needed
Run cargo build --workspace && cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings && cargo fmt --check

description: Phase 1.3: Create make/engine_features.rs — Feature enum with engine-to-feature mapping matrix and validation
steps: Create new file crates/libaipm/src/make/engine_features.rs
Define Feature enum with 7 variants: Skill, Agent, Mcp, Hook, OutputStyle, Lsp, Extension
Derive Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq on Feature
Implement cli_name() returning static str: skill, agent, mcp, hook, output-style, lsp, extension

Implement label() returning static str for wizard prompts: 'Skills (prompt templates)', 'Agents (autonomous sub-agents)', 'MCP Servers (tool providers)', 'Hooks (lifecycle events)', 'Output Styles (response formatting)', 'LSP Servers (language intelligence)', 'Extensions (Copilot extensions)'
Implement from_cli_name(s: &str) -> Option<Feature> parsing CLI flag values

Implement features_for_engine(engine: &str) -> Vec<Feature> per the engine-feature matrix in spec section 5.3 — Claude: Skill/Agent/Mcp/Hook/OutputStyle; Copilot: Skill/Agent/Mcp/Hook/Lsp/Extension; Both: all 7
Implement validate_features(engine: &str, features: &[Feature]) -> Result<(), Vec<Feature>> that checks each feature is in the engine's supported set
Add unit tests: engine_features_claude, engine_features_copilot, engine_features_both, validate_features_rejects_lsp_for_claude, from_cli_name_roundtrip
Run cargo build --workspace && cargo test --workspace && cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings && cargo fmt --check

description: Phase 1.4: Create make/templates.rs — Minimal lint-passing component template generators
steps: Create new file crates/libaipm/src/make/templates.rs
Implement skill_template(name: &str) -> String — YAML frontmatter with name + description ('TODO: Describe <name>'), placeholder body instructions
Implement agent_template(name: &str) -> String — YAML frontmatter with name + description + tools: [], placeholder body
Implement mcp_template() -> String — JSON: {"mcpServers": {}}
Implement hook_template() -> String — JSON: {"hooks": []}
Implement output_style_template(name: &str) -> String — YAML frontmatter with name, placeholder body
Implement lsp_template() -> String — JSON: {"lspServers": {}}
Ensure all templates pass corresponding lint rules: skill/missing-name, skill/missing-description, skill/name-too-long, skill/description-too-long, hook/legacy-event-name, plugin/required-fields
Add snapshot tests: skill_template_snapshot, agent_template_snapshot, mcp_template_snapshot, hook_template_snapshot, output_style_template_snapshot, lsp_template_snapshot
Run cargo build --workspace && cargo test --workspace && cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings && cargo fmt --check

description: Phase 1.5: Create make/discovery.rs — Walk-up marketplace finder that searches parent directories for .ai/
steps: Create new file crates/libaipm/src/make/discovery.rs
Implement find_marketplace(start_dir: &Path, fs: &dyn Fs) -> Result<PathBuf, Error>
Walk up from start_dir checking for .ai/.claude-plugin/marketplace.json at each level
Handle edge cases per spec section 5.4: .ai/ without marketplace.json (skip), permission denied (stop), root reached (MarketplaceNotFound with helpful error suggesting 'aipm init')

Add unit tests: find_marketplace_walks_up (MockFs with .ai/ two levels up), find_marketplace_not_found (MockFs with no .ai/), find_marketplace_skips_incomplete (MockFs with .ai/ but no marketplace.json)
Run cargo build --workspace && cargo test --workspace && cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings && cargo fmt --check

description: Phase 1.6: Create make/mod.rs — MakePluginOpts, MakeResult structs and make_plugin() orchestrator function
steps: Create new file crates/libaipm/src/make/mod.rs with pub mod declarations for action, error, engine_features, templates, discovery
Define MakePluginOpts<'a> struct: marketplace_dir, name, engine, features (as specified in spec section 5.6)
Define MakeResult struct with actions: Vec<Action>
Implement make_plugin(opts, fs) -> Result<MakeResult, Error> following the 10-step execution sequence in spec section 5.6
Step 1-2: Resolve plugin_dir, guard existing dir with DirectoryAlreadyExists idempotent early return
Step 3-4: Create plugin_dir and .claude-plugin/ subdirectory via fs.create_dir_all
Step 5: For each feature, create feature-specific directory and write template using templates module
Step 6: Generate and write plugin.json via generate::plugin_json::generate() with component paths for selected features
Step 7: Register in marketplace.json via generate::marketplace::register(), push PluginRegistered or PluginAlreadyRegistered
Step 8: If engine is claude or both, read/create .claude/settings.json, call generate::settings::enable_plugin(), push PluginEnabled. If copilot, no-op per NG4
Step 9: Push PluginCreated summary action

Add unit tests: make_plugin_creates_skill_plugin, make_plugin_creates_composite, make_plugin_idempotent, make_plugin_registers_in_marketplace, make_plugin_enables_in_settings, make_plugin_copilot_no_settings, make_plugin_both_engines
Run cargo build --workspace && cargo test --workspace && cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings && cargo fmt --check

description: Phase 1.7: Register make module in lib.rs — Add pub mod make to crates/libaipm/src/lib.rs
steps: Read crates/libaipm/src/lib.rs to find the module declaration section
Add 'pub mod make;' alongside existing module declarations
Ensure the module is unconditionally compiled (not feature-gated)
Run cargo build --workspace && cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings && cargo fmt --check

description: Phase 2.1: Add MultiSelect variant to PromptKind and MultiSelected to PromptAnswer in libaipm::wizard
steps: Read crates/libaipm/src/wizard.rs to understand current PromptKind and PromptAnswer enums
Add MultiSelect { options: Vec<&'static str>, defaults: Vec<bool> } variant to PromptKind enum
Add MultiSelected(Vec<usize>) variant to PromptAnswer enum
Update existing tests in wizard.rs: add prompt_kind_variants test case for MultiSelect, add prompt_answer test case for MultiSelected
Ensure Debug derive still works for new variants
Run cargo build --workspace && cargo test --workspace && cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings && cargo fmt --check

description: Phase 2.2: Add make_plugin wizard prompt steps and answer resolver to aipm::wizard
steps: Read crates/aipm/src/wizard.rs to understand existing prompt step patterns (workspace_prompt_steps, resolve_workspace_answers)
Add ENGINE_OPTIONS constant: ['Claude Code', 'Copilot CLI', 'Both']
Implement make_plugin_prompt_steps(flag_name, flag_engine, flag_features, engine_feature_labels, engine_feature_defaults) -> Vec<PromptStep> per spec section 5.2.2
Conditionally include Name (Text, validate=true) if flag_name.is_none()
Conditionally include Engine (Select with ENGINE_OPTIONS, default_index 0) if flag_engine.is_none()
Conditionally include Features (MultiSelect with engine-filtered options) if flag_features.is_empty()
Implement resolve_make_plugin_answers(answers, flag_name, flag_engine, flag_features) -> (String, String, Vec<String>) using idx counter pattern
Map engine Select index to string: 0->claude, 1->copilot, 2->both
Map feature MultiSelected indices back to feature cli_name strings

Add unit tests: make_plugin_steps_all_flags_set, make_plugin_steps_no_flags, make_plugin_steps_name_only, resolve_make_plugin_from_flags, resolve_make_plugin_from_answers, resolve_make_plugin_claude_features, resolve_make_plugin_copilot_features
Run cargo build --workspace && cargo test --workspace && cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings && cargo fmt --check

description: Phase 2.3: Add MultiSelect handler to wizard_tty.rs and resolve_make_plugin() entry point
steps: Read crates/aipm/src/wizard_tty.rs to understand execute_prompts() dispatch pattern

Add PromptKind::MultiSelect branch to execute_prompts() per spec section 5.2.3: create inquire::MultiSelect, set defaults, handle help message, map selected labels back to indices, return PromptAnswer::MultiSelected
Implement resolve_make_plugin(interactive, flag_name, flag_engine, flag_features) -> Result<(String, String, Vec<String>), ...> entry point

Interactive path: two-phase execution — (1) execute name + engine prompts, resolve engine, (2) compute engine-filtered feature options via engine_features::features_for_engine, build feature MultiSelect step, execute, resolve all
Non-interactive path: validate required flags present (name, feature), default engine to 'claude', return directly
Return make::Error::MissingFlag for missing --name or --feature in non-interactive mode
Run cargo build --workspace && cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings && cargo fmt --check

description: Phase 3.1: Add Commands::Make variant to main.rs with positional arg and flat flags
steps: Read crates/aipm/src/main.rs Commands enum to understand existing variant patterns

Add Make variant to Commands enum per spec section 5.1: what: String (#[arg(value_parser = ["plugin"])]), name: Option<String> (#[arg(long)]), engine: Option<String> (#[arg(long)]), feature: Vec<String> (#[arg(long)]), yes: bool (#[arg(short = 'y', long)]), dir: PathBuf (#[arg(long, default_value = ".")])
Add #[command(about = "Create new plugins and components")] on the variant
Run cargo build --workspace && cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings && cargo fmt --check

description: Phase 3.2: Add Make variant to CliError enum
steps: Read crates/aipm/src/error.rs to understand existing CliError variants and #[from] pattern
Add Make(#[from] libaipm::make::Error) variant with #[error(transparent)]
Run cargo build --workspace && cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings && cargo fmt --check

description: Phase 3.3: Implement cmd_make_plugin() handler and wire into run() dispatch
steps: Read crates/aipm/src/main.rs cmd_init() (lines 329-376) as the pattern model
Implement cmd_make_plugin(name, engine, features, yes, dir) -> Result<(), CliError> following spec section 5.9
Step 1: resolve_dir(dir), compute interactive = !yes && stdin.is_terminal()
Step 2: Call wizard_tty::resolve_make_plugin() for value resolution
Step 3: Validate name via manifest::validate::check_name with ValidationMode::Strict
Step 4: Parse features via Feature::from_cli_name, validate via engine_features::validate_features
Step 5: Call make::discovery::find_marketplace() for marketplace discovery
Step 6: Construct MakePluginOpts and call make::make_plugin()
Step 7: Render actions to stdout using writeln! with match on each Action variant per spec section 5.9
Add match arm in run() for Some(Commands::Make { what, name, engine, feature, yes, dir }) per spec section 5.11: dispatch 'plugin' to cmd_make_plugin, error on unknown target
Run cargo build --workspace && cargo test --workspace && cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings && cargo fmt --check

description: Phase 4.1: Replace generate_scaffold_script() TypeScript with bash script in workspace_init/mod.rs
steps: Read crates/libaipm/src/workspace_init/mod.rs generate_scaffold_script() function (lines 327-416)
Replace the 88-line TypeScript string literal with the ~5-line bash script from spec section 5.10: #!/usr/bin/env bash, set -euo pipefail, aipm make plugin call
Update the file path in scaffold_marketplace() from scripts/scaffold-plugin.ts to scripts/scaffold-plugin.sh (line 234-236)
Update generate_starter_manifest() to change scripts component from scaffold-plugin.ts to scaffold-plugin.sh
Update plugin.json generation call if any component paths reference .ts
Update the existing scaffold_script_snapshot snap file to match new bash content
Run cargo build --workspace && cargo test --workspace && cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings && cargo fmt --check

description: Phase 4.2: Update generate_skill_template() SKILL.md to reference aipm make plugin instead of node script
steps: Read crates/libaipm/src/workspace_init/mod.rs generate_skill_template() function (lines 299-324)

Replace the SKILL.md content that instructs LLM to run 'node --experimental-strip-types scaffold-plugin.ts' with content from spec section 5.10: frontmatter (name: scaffold-plugin, description), body with aipm make plugin usage instructions and flag examples
Update the skill_definition_snapshot snap file to match the new SKILL.md content
Run cargo build --workspace && cargo test --workspace && cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings && cargo fmt --check

description: Phase 4.3: Fix on-disk .ai/starter-aipm-plugin/ drift to match generator output
steps: Read the current on-disk .ai/ files: .ai/.claude-plugin/marketplace.json, .ai/starter-aipm-plugin/.claude-plugin/plugin.json, .ai/starter-aipm-plugin/scripts/scaffold-plugin.ts, .ai/starter-aipm-plugin/skills/scaffold-plugin/SKILL.md
Replace .ai/starter-aipm-plugin/scripts/scaffold-plugin.ts with scripts/scaffold-plugin.sh containing the new bash script content
Update .ai/starter-aipm-plugin/skills/scaffold-plugin/SKILL.md to match the updated generate_skill_template() output
Update .ai/starter-aipm-plugin/.claude-plugin/plugin.json to add component keys (skills, agents, hooks paths) matching what the generator produces
Align .ai/.claude-plugin/marketplace.json marketplace name if it differs from the generator default
Remove the old .ai/starter-aipm-plugin/scripts/scaffold-plugin.ts file
Run cargo build --workspace && cargo test --workspace && cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings && cargo fmt --check

description: Phase 5.1: Add unit tests for make module — orchestrator, marketplace registration, settings enablement
steps: Add test make_plugin_creates_skill_plugin in make/mod.rs: MockFs, call make_plugin with feature Skill, verify directory structure (.ai/<name>/, skills/<name>/SKILL.md, .claude-plugin/plugin.json), verify action list contains DirectoryCreated, FileWritten, PluginRegistered, PluginEnabled, PluginCreated
Add test make_plugin_creates_composite: features [Skill, Agent, Hook], verify all 3 feature directories created, plugin.json has all component paths
Add test make_plugin_idempotent: pre-create plugin dir in MockFs, call make_plugin, verify DirectoryAlreadyExists action returned, no other actions
Add test make_plugin_registers_in_marketplace: pre-create .ai/.claude-plugin/marketplace.json with empty plugins array, verify after make_plugin it contains the new entry
Add test make_plugin_enables_in_settings: pre-create .claude/settings.json, verify enabledPlugins key added
Add test make_plugin_copilot_no_settings: engine copilot, verify no .github/copilot/ files created
Add test make_plugin_both_engines: engine both, verify Claude settings written and all features available
Run cargo test --workspace && cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings

description: Phase 5.2: Add unit test templates_pass_lint — verify generated templates pass corresponding lint rules
steps: In make/templates.rs tests, add templates_pass_lint test
Generate each template (skill, agent, mcp, hook, output-style, lsp) using the template functions
Write templates to a MockFs in the expected directory structure
Run the relevant lint rules against each template file using the lint module's check_file() method
Assert zero diagnostics with Severity::Error for each template
Run cargo test --workspace && cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings

description: Phase 5.3: Add E2E tests for aipm make plugin command in crates/aipm/tests/make_e2e.rs
steps: Create new file crates/aipm/tests/make_e2e.rs

Add test make_plugin_skill_claude: aipm init -y, then aipm make plugin --name foo --engine claude --feature skill -y, assert .ai/foo/ exists, skills/foo/SKILL.md has frontmatter, plugin.json valid, marketplace.json has entry, .claude/settings.json has enabledPlugins
Add test make_plugin_composite: aipm init -y, then aipm make plugin --name bar --engine claude --feature skill --feature agent --feature hook -y, assert all 3 feature directories created
Add test make_plugin_copilot: aipm init -y, then aipm make plugin --name baz --engine copilot --feature skill -y, assert .ai/baz/ created, no .github/copilot/ files
Add test make_plugin_both_engines: aipm init -y, then aipm make plugin --name qux --engine both --feature skill --feature lsp -y, assert both features created, Claude settings updated
Add test make_plugin_idempotent: run aipm make plugin twice, second run exits 0, stdout contains 'exists'
Add test make_plugin_lint_clean: aipm init -y, aipm make plugin, then aipm lint — zero diagnostics
Add test make_plugin_missing_name: aipm make plugin --engine claude --feature skill -y (no --name), non-zero exit, stderr contains 'missing required flag: --name'
Add test make_plugin_missing_feature: aipm make plugin --name foo --engine claude -y (no --feature), non-zero exit, stderr contains 'missing required flag: --feature'
Add test make_plugin_invalid_feature_for_engine: --engine claude --feature lsp, non-zero exit, stderr contains 'not supported by engine'
Add test make_plugin_no_marketplace: no prior init, non-zero exit, stderr contains 'marketplace not found'
Run cargo test --workspace && cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings

description: Phase 5.4: Update existing starter plugin E2E tests in init_e2e.rs for bash replacement
steps: Read crates/aipm/tests/init_e2e.rs lines 255-311 to find the three scaffold script tests
Update run_scaffold() helper: change from Command::new('node').args(['--experimental-strip-types', &script, plugin_name]) to invoke the bash script or aipm make plugin directly
Update scaffold_script_registers_in_marketplace_json test: invoke bash script, assert same marketplace.json result
Update scaffold_script_enables_in_settings_json test: invoke bash script, assert same settings.json result
Update scaffold_script_creates_plugin_directory test: invoke bash script, assert directory structure
Remove any has_node_with_strip_types() gate if present since bash is universally available
Run cargo test --workspace && cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings

description: Phase 5.5: Add BDD feature file tests/features/make.feature for aipm make plugin scenarios
steps: Create new file tests/features/make.feature

Add Scenario: Create a skill plugin for Claude — Given initialized workspace, When aipm make plugin --name my-skill --engine claude --feature skill -y, Then assert plugin directory, SKILL.md content, marketplace entry, settings entry, lint clean
Add Scenario: Create a composite plugin with multiple features — skill + agent + hook, verify all directories
Add Scenario: Idempotent re-run — create plugin twice, second exits 0, stdout contains 'exists'
Add Scenario: Missing feature flag in non-interactive mode — -y without --feature, non-zero exit
Add Scenario: Unsupported feature for engine — claude + lsp, non-zero exit with error message
Implement step definitions if BDD runner requires them (check existing step definitions pattern in crates/aipm/tests/)
Run cargo test --workspace

description: Phase 5.6: Verify 89% branch coverage across workspace and fix any coverage gaps
steps: Run: cargo +nightly llvm-cov clean --workspace
Run: cargo +nightly llvm-cov --no-report --workspace --branch
Run: cargo +nightly llvm-cov --no-report --doc
Run: cargo +nightly llvm-cov report --doctests --branch --ignore-filename-regex '(tests/|research/|specs/|wizard_tty\.rs|lsp\.rs)'
Check TOTAL branch column shows >= 89%
If below 89%, identify uncovered branches in the new make/ module and add targeted tests
Re-run coverage verification until >= 89% is achieved
Run all four gates: cargo build --workspace && cargo test --workspace && cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings && cargo fmt --check
